text: :rotating_light: TRIGGERED — [P1] payment-service: error rate exceeded 25% threshold (current: 48.3%). Assigned to @priya.sharma. Incident PD-5501. https://quest-global.pagerduty.com/incidents/PD-5501

Ack — looking at this now. Seeing a wall of TypeErrors in payment-service Sentry dashboard. Looks like `processTransaction` is blowing up on every request. @rajesh.kumar are you seeing 5xx spikes on the gateway side?
replies: rajesh.kumar: Yes, api-gateway is returning 502s on all /checkout routes. Circuit breaker tripped for payment-service about 3 mins ago. | anita.desai: order-service is backing up too — our payment client is timing out after 30s and we have 2k+ pending orders in the queue.

text: Confirmed: api-gateway circuit breaker is OPEN for payment-service. All checkout requests are getting fast-failed with 503. Error rate on the gateway jumped from 0.2% to 34% at exactly 16:43. Checking what changed at that time.
replies: vikram.patel: Grafana dashboard is lighting up — p99 latency on order-service went from 180ms to 28s.

text: Found it. payment-service v2.4.1 was auto-deployed at 16:43 via GitHub Actions. Commit 7c3a9f1e — 'Refactor payment processor to use new gateway adapter pattern'. The refactor changed the gateway interface but the old `createCharge` method signature is gone. The new adapter returns a different shape and `chargeId` is now nested under `response.transaction.id` instead of `response.chargeId`.
replies: rajesh.kumar: Classic interface-breaking change. Did this not have integration tests? | priya.sharma: CI unit tests failed (run-4408) but the deploy pipeline ran anyway because it's on a separate workflow trigger. We need to fix that. | anita.desai: That explains the cascade — payment-service throws TypeError on every charge, order-service retries 3x with 30s timeout each, exhausts its connection pool, then api-gateway circuit breaker trips.

text: I'm rolling back payment-service to v2.4.0 now. The stable commit is e8f0a2b4. @rajesh.kumar can you manually reset the circuit breaker on api-gateway once the rollback is live? @anita.desai please drain the order retry queue before we re-enable.
:white_check_mark: Rollback deployed — payment-service is back on v2.4.0 (deploy dep-710). Health checks passing. Sentry error rate dropping. @rajesh.kumar go ahead and reset the circuit breaker.
replies: rajesh.kumar: Circuit breaker reset. api-gateway is routing to payment-service again. 200s coming back. | anita.desai: Order queue is draining. Processing backlog now — should be clear in about 10 mins.

text: All clear on my end. api-gateway error rate back to baseline 0.1%. p99 latency at 145ms. Circuit breaker is CLOSED and healthy. Marking PD-5501 as resolved.
replies: vikram.patel: notification-service email queue drained too. All order confirmation emails are sent. Grafana looks green across the board.

text: Incident resolved. Summary: payment-service v2.4.1 (commit 7c3a9f1e) broke the gateway adapter interface causing TypeError on all payment requests. Cascaded to order-service (connection pool exhaustion) and api-gateway (circuit breaker trip). Total impact: ~42 minutes, est. 3,200 failed checkout attempts. Root cause: deploy pipeline not gated on CI test results. Action items: 1) Gate deploy workflow on CI pass 2) Add integration tests for gateway adapter 3) Add contract tests between payment-service and order-service. Scheduling post-mortem for tomorrow 10am.

🚨 *[SRE Incident Resolution]* Identified outage culprit: *payment-service*.
- *Root Cause*: Deployment of payment-service v2.
- *ServiceNow Audit*: Change state is REJECTED_CAB (WARNING: UNAUTHORIZED CHANGE!).
- *Resolution*: Rolled back to v2.4.0 at 2026-05-26T17:03:00Z. Incident resolved.
